title: Short title
doc_html:
PART IV.  BLIND PERSONS' LITERACY

RIGHTS AND EDUCATION

§1981.  Short title

This Part shall be known and may be cited as the "Blind Persons' Literacy Rights and Education Act".

Acts 1992, No. 923, §1.
